productDisplayName: Chhota Bheem Kids Boy Dholakpur Meri Jaan Blue Tshirt
description: Composition Blue T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, round neck, and graphic print on the front Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash separately using a mild detergent Line dry inside-out in shade Warm iron; do not iron on print Dress your little one in this T-shirt from Green Gold's collection and watch him flaunt his love for the fun town of Dholakpur as chhota bheem in style.
